_meta.notes: DRAFT — values extracted from codebase. Every field marked VERIFY must be cross-checked against the official gazette before use in production.

far._note: Floor Area Ratio by zone × road width. Key = upper boundary of road width bracket in metres. 9999 = above 30m road.
far._status: VERIFY — current code uses road-width-only flat table (no zone distinction). Zone-specific values below are indicative from BDA RMP 2015 Table 4.2 and must be confirmed.

ground_coverage_pct._note: Maximum ground coverage percentage by zone × road width. Key = upper boundary of road width bracket.
ground_coverage_pct._status: VERIFY — currently in codebase, source unclear. Cross-check against BBMP Bylaws Table / BDA RMP.

setbacks._note: All values in metres. Plot area threshold in sqft (1500 sqft ≈ 139 sqm).
setbacks._status: VERIFY — confirm small/standard boundary and exact values from BBMP Bylaws Section 8.

fire_noc._note: Fire safety thresholds per NBC 2016 Part IV and KSFES requirements.
fire_noc._status: VERIFY — confirm height thresholds and commercial BUA threshold (currently coded as sqft, likely should be sqm).
requirements_above_9m: Fire escape staircase — minimum 1.2m clear width
Emergency lighting in corridors and staircases
Fire tender access road — min 4.5m wide, 4.5m clearance, 9m turning radius
requirements_above_15m: Fire lift — minimum 1.1m x 2.1m car, 630kg capacity
Hose reel and extinguishers on every floor
requirements_above_24m: Fire command centre at ground level
Two separate fire escape staircases mandatory
Refuge area every 7 floors — minimum 15 sqm (not counted in FAR)

staircase._note: Staircase and lift requirements per BBMP Bylaws and NBC 2016.
staircase._status: VERIFY — confirm width thresholds and lift floor trigger from BBMP Section 20.7.

basement._note: Basement regulations per BBMP Bylaws Section 18.
basement._status: VERIFY — confirm max depth, FAR exclusion conditions, and ventilation standard.
basement.far_exclusion_condition: Parking and services only — any habitable use makes it countable in FAR
basement.setback_in_basement: May extend to plot boundary for parking/services — requires structural stability certificate

projections._note: Balcony and projection rules per BBMP Bylaws Section 15.
projections._status: VERIFY — confirm max projection limits and the 20% FAR exclusion rule.

parking._status: VERIFY — confirm car-per-unit ratios and visitor percentages from actual Table 23.

far_exclusions._note: Built-up areas NOT counted towards FAR per BBMP Bylaws.
far_exclusions._status: VERIFY — confirm each exclusion and any area caps from BBMP Section 14.
items: Basement parking floors — not counted in FAR if used for parking/services only
Balconies up to 1.5m projection (within 20% of floor area)
Watchman cabin up to 9 sqm at entrance
Refuge area (not counted in FAR per NBC 2016 Part IV Section 4.11)

bylaw_thresholds._note: Key height/area thresholds that trigger different regulatory tiers.
bylaw_thresholds._status: VERIFY — these drive the scenario comparison labels.
